results.rendered_html:
anūkya (von anūka) n.
1〉 Rückgrath: grīvābhyasta uṣṇihābhyaḥ kīkasābhyo anūkyāt . yakṣmaṃ doṣaṇya1maṃsābhyāṃ bāhubhyāṃ vi vṛhāmi te  ṚV. 10,163,2 . ṛco yasyānūkyam  AV. 9,6,1 . khalaḥ pātraṃ sphyāvaṃsāvīśe anūkye 11,3,9 .
— 2〉 das Fleisch am Gehirnschädel  ŚAT. BR. 3,8,3,11 .
